message:
fix(markdown): update rich_rust API call from show_links to hyperlinks

The rich_rust Markdown component renamed its show_links() method to
hyperlinks() in a recent version. This updates the call site to match
the new API, fixing a compilation error against rich_rust >= 0.2.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
